ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
Off Calendar Apr-01-2026 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Continued To Apr-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re: Mediation Referral And/Or Breslin Order
Off Calendar Nov-12-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Wrobel for petitioner Nejra Allen, who was also present (via Zoom).
Matthew Talbot for administrator Keith Franklin, who was also present (via Zoom).
Brittany Franklin, interested party (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Preliminary Distribution.

Mr. Talbot advised that he and Mr. Wrobel had conferred and reached an agreement to allow a preliminary distribution equal to 50% of the current distributable amount to four beneficiaries (Keith Franklin, Nejra Allen, DeAnna Allan, and Brittany Franklin) and that he will withdraw his objection.

Counsel agreed that no distribution would be made to Michael Franklin or Michelle Franklin at this time. Mr. Talbot explained that Michael Franklin's distribution was opposed due to alleged misconduct giving rise to potential surcharge claims, and that the parties were preparing to file a petition for final distribution which would address any reallocation or offsets.

Following discussion, the Court took the matter under submission with the intent to approve the preliminary distribution to Keith Franklin, Nejra Allen, DeAnna Franklin, and Brittany Franklin. Counsel were directed to submit a proposed order.

Regarding mediation, counsel reported that no mediation had been scheduled, and they agreed that it was premature to proceed to mediation at this time. The status regarding mediation was taken off calendar.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
Off Calendar Nov-12-2025 Continued To Jan-20-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-15-2025 Continued To Nov-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Wrobel for petitioner Nejra Allen (via Zoom).
Toni Coaston for administrator Keith Franklin (via Zoom).
Michael Franklin, objector in pro per (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Preliminary Distribution.

Ms. Coaston stated that the administrator expects to file a petition for final distribution by the end of the month, after addressing pending accounting issues and resolved damage calculations related to prior property sales.

The Court inquired as to any urgency that required a preliminary distribution. Mr. Wrobel stated that Ms. Allen behind on her mortgage and is on disability, and was therefore requesting preliminary distribution to prevent default on her mortgage. Ms. Coaston stated she was agreeable to discussing a limited preliminary distribution to Ms. Allen.

Michael Franklin raised concerns about his siblings' handling of estate matters. The Court advised those issues would be addressed when surcharge matters were properly before the Court.

The Court directed the parties to meet and confer and discussed the pro bono mediation program. Mr. Wrobel and Ms. Coaston agreed that mediation would be beneficial.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to November 12, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. Status on Breslin Order and Mediation Referral was set for hearing on the same date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-19-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Matthew Talbot, Esq., for Keith Franklin, Petitioner.
Thomas S. Wrobel, Esq., for Nejra Allen, interested party.

Mr. Talbot reports regarding the status of the estate and of the delays with this matter. The issue of an accounting and of the range of dates that the accounting should cover. The court advises of its intent to take the instant petition off calendar and set a future date for a status hearing. No objection to the court's suggestion is presented. A new status hearing is set for May-14-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Either the first accounting petition or a petition for final distribution on waiver of account must be filed by Apr-29-2025.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Thomas Wrobel, Esq., via Zoom, for and with Debra Dolch, Petitioner, and specially appearing for and with Nejra Allen, Objector.

Matthew Talbot, Esq., via Zoom, for Keith Franklin, Petitioner.

Upon the court's query, Mr. Wrobel confirms his special appearance for Ms. Allen as an Objector.

Messrs. Wrobel and Talbot offer argument regarding their respective petitions and Keith Franklin's higher priority to be appointed Administrator over Ms. Dolch. Upon conclusion of argument, the court advises that it is taking both subject the matters under submission with the intent to grant Keith Franklin's petition and deny Ms. Dolch's.

The subject petitions are taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cabrera. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-09-2023 Continued To Sep-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for and with Debra Dolch (petitioner) by zoom.
Michael Franklin (son of decedent) appeared in propria persona.

Mr. Franklin stated that he is objecting to the petition, that he has not spoken with Mr. Wrobel, that he does not know what's going on, that he does not have an attorney, but he intends to get one, and that he needs a couple of weeks. The Petition for Letters of Administration is continued to September 20, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Franklin is to put his objections in writing by September 6, 2023. Mr. Wroble invited Mr. Franklin to give him a call so that they can discuss the case and provided his phone number.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
